ops.title: semsearch review disposition: I1 git-URL indexing is out of ccx scope (wontfix)
ops.body: Review finding I1 (verified 2026-07-22): passing an http(s) git URL as the search path fails at os.Stat, where semble's CLI would clone+index it (from_git). Disposition: WONTFIX as a bug. ccx has zero URL-handling anywhere and searches the local working repo by design; remote-URL indexing is not a ccx use case. At most a friendlier error than a raw stat failure is a nice-to-have. Recorded so a future reviewer doesn't re-open it. Full review of the native-semble-port landed with the ship: determinism trio (R1/R2/R3) + cache-key revision (I3) + embed hygiene (E2/E3/E4) + chunk robustness (C2/C3/C5) fixed pre-ship; C1/I2/C4, I4, E1 filed as backlog tasks 41976d4/c06d636/699aeaa.
